top_emotional_moments.text: Thanks so much for joining us for this special live stream Q&A episode of Dogman Encounters.
You know, earlier this week, I was thinking to myself, here I am about 500 episodes in,
and I still haven't aired, I've never aired a Q&A episode of the show.
It seems like when I've been airing these live stream episodes, a bunch of questions pop up that really aren't targeted at the guest.
They're more general questions about dogmen that are being asked.
So I thought, you know what, maybe I should just air that live stream Q&A show and answer some of those questions.
Seems like there's no lack of questions popping up when we do this, so that's why we're going to air tonight's show.
But having said that, I've got some special guests on lined up to answer your questions.
